series_metadata.series_description: The Cambridge Adjustment Forms consist of adjustment requests submitted by the Managed Care Organizations (MCO) to adjust bills in the Cambridge billing system.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in office 60 days after record has been digitally imaged and checked for accuracy, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain machine readable (electronic correspondence) for 2 years, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
